name: newsletter-monetization-planner
description: Use when the user asks to "monetize my newsletter", "build a sponsorship rate card", or "model paid-subscription revenue"; produces a revenue model (paid tiers, ad/sponsorship inventory + CPM/flat rate card, referral/boost loops), a list-growth ↔ revenue projection, and honest-offer / disclosure checks for the SEND-D lever. Not for scoring the whole program or running D1 — use email-quality-auditor; not for the return math — use roi-calculator; not for the post-click page — use landing-optimizer
author: aaron-he-zhu
